item.title: Circular No. 2/2025: Updated AML/CFT Requirements for Digital Payment Providers

obligations.description: FIs must conduct enhanced due diligence for all digital payment customers rated medium-high risk.
obligations.gap: Policy covers standard CDD but does not reference digital payment-specific risk factors or enhanced thresholds for this segment.

obligations.description: Transaction monitoring rules must include digital-payment-specific typologies (rapid fund cycling, micro-structuring via apps).
obligations.gap: Policy mandates transaction monitoring but specifies no digital-channel typologies or scenario coverage.

obligations.description: Customer risk assessments must be updated to include digital payment channel risk as a standalone factor.
obligations.gap: Policy risk scoring model predates the digital payments circular; channel risk not listed as a variable.

obligations.description: AML Compliance Officer must certify programme adequacy against updated requirements by Q3 2025.
obligations.evidence: Section 2: An AML Compliance Officer must be appointed at senior management level.
